text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One important use of NLP is text understanding, where computers can read and interpret the meaning of documents or articles. Another common application is translation, allowing people to instantly convert text from one language to another, such as from English to Spanish. Sentiment analysis is also widely used by companies to determine if customer reviews are positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have conversations with users, answering questions or providing support in a natural way.
